trivia_bullets.text: From Modern Horizons 3 (June 14, 2024). Previewed May 23, 2024 by Adam The Gathering on Twitter before official spoiler season.

The second ability (1 damage to each opponent whenever you cast from anywhere other than hand) creates passive punishment for flashback, cascade, and exile-play strategies -- unusual for a common-rarity design tier artifact.

Energy-cycle flag: Unstable Amulet's {E}{E} ETB pairs directly with Aether Revolt (MH3), which pings when you gain energy counters. Alongside Inventor's Axe (MH3 126), it forms a two-card energy-artifact cluster in inventory from the same set.
sources: Scryfall: all_parts (combo piece: Energy Reserve MH3)

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC rank 4,016 -- most popular card in this batch. Approximately 34,725 Commander decks. 35% inclusion rate in Loot, the Key to Everything storm-adjacent Commander builds. Not Pauper-legal.
sources: EDHREC: Unstable Amulet card page, via WebSearch snippet

related_cards.name: Inventor's Axe
related_cards.note: Same {E}{E}-on-entry pattern, same red artifact type; energy-lair co-member

related_cards.name: Aether Revolt
related_cards.note: Scryfall combo piece; pings whenever Unstable Amulet generates energy counters

related_cards.name: Energy Reserve
related_cards.note: Scryfall-listed combo piece; energy redistribution engine

related_cards.name: Loot, the Key to Everything
related_cards.note: Primary Commander home at 35% inclusion rate per EDHREC

flags.color_magic_tag_note: tags_filter is absent from this card's frontmatter entirely -- no red-magic or artifact tag in filter layer; may need janitor pass to add tags_filter block
flags.edgelord_flag: Unstable Amulet is the highest-EDHREC-rank card in this batch (4,016). Together with Inventor's Axe (MH3 126) and Colossal Dreadmask (MH3 148) forms a 3-card MH3 artifact cluster with energy and equipment overlap -- strongest substrate candidate for an MH3 energy lair.
